channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker

item.title: Is the AI boom eating its own tail? The strange economics of billion-dollar deals

Companies fund each other to buy cloud services and AI chips, inflating valuations. While demand for AI is real, these opaque deals r… [Amazon, Anthropic, Alphabet]
